title: Shopkeeper Bonds
entries: I have a sick relative that my business supports.
I owe a lot of money to organized crime, and they're threatening to collect. Violently.
I'm counting down the days to a peaceful retirement with my spouse or loved ones.
I hope to earn enough money to be able to pursue my true love, who is well above my station.
I'm on the run from the law, and plan to leave town before they finally recognize me.
A large portion of my money is spent atoning for my shameful past.
